title: LipAgg Recruitment protocol
author: Fontaine, Emilie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Deliverable 6.2 is part of work package 6: Joint Governance, Organisation and Management. This deliverable, the LipAgg Recruitment Protocol, describes the recruitment and selection protocol that was established and validated by the Supervisory Board at the LipAgg kick-off meeting. The recruitment process considers the specific constraints of each institution while benefiting from the diverse perspectives of the researchers involved. This collaborative approach enriched the evaluation process and supported the selection of the most suitable candidates for each position. Particular care was taken to ensure an Open, Transparent, and Merit-based Recruitment of researchers (OTM-R) in the recruitment and selection protocol.
